actions.intent: Clip the right vine pressure without abandoning the lower rescue priority.
Open the lower puppy's route and avoid drifting into upper-side cleanup.
Finish the lower water-near puppy first by cutting the lower vine route.
Pivot to the upper puppy after the urgent lower rescue is safe.
Advance the upper route without spending actions on low-value board cleanup.
Break the upper-right crate chain and put the second puppy one clear away.

notes: Designer-approved pressure path: lower water-near puppy first, vine clips only when they protect the route, then pivot to upper.
